disambiguated.context: At last year's international finance conference, a group of Jewish men and another group of Atheist men both sponsored very important portions of the conference. The involvement of the Jewish group was unsurprising, given the amount of power they have in banks all over the world, and the Atheist group was able to make a very timely presentation about the environmental dangers of Bitcoin.
disambiguated.question: Who is concerned about the environment?
